{{- $menuID := .menuID }} {{- $page := .page }} {{- with index site.Menus $menuID }}
{{- partial "inline/menu/walk.html" (dict "page" $page "menuEntries" .) }}
{{- end }} {{- define "_partials/inline/menu/walk.html" }} {{- $page := .page }} {{- range .menuEntries }}
{{- $attrs := dict "href" .URL }} {{- if $page.IsMenuCurrent .Menu . }} {{- $attrs = merge $attrs (dict "class" "menu-button menu-button--active" "aria-current" "page") }} {{- else if $page.HasMenuCurrent .Menu . }} {{- $attrs = merge $attrs (dict "class" "menu-button menu-button--ancestor" "aria-current" "true") }} {{- else }} {{- $attrs = merge $attrs (dict "class" "menu-button") }} {{- end }} {{- $name := .Name }} {{- with .Identifier }} {{- with T . }} {{- $name = . }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- if .HasChildren }} {{- $attrs = merge $attrs (dict "aria-haspopup" "true" "aria-controls" (add "submenu-" $name)) }} {{- end }} {{ $name }} {{- with .Children }}
{{- partial "inline/menu/walk.html" (dict "page" $page "menuEntries" .) }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }} {{- end }}
